title: Btor backend seems to lose logic for (* keep *) signals

features.name: keep_attribute_on_assigned_wire_non_output
features.description: Code should include a wire marked with (* keep *) attribute that is driven by an assignment but is not a primary output
features.snippet:
(* keep *) wire eq_a_b;
assign eq_a_b = (num_a == num_b);
